Title: Update Author from GameBanana
UpdateAuthorsDescription: Update all mod authors from GameBanana
SmartUpdateDescription: Only update mods with unknown or missing authors
FetchAuthorsDescription: Fetch and update authors, versions, and dates from GameBanana
SkipInvalidUrlsDescription: Skip mods that have been marked with invalid URLs
ConfirmFetchAllData: This will fetch and update author, version, and date information from GameBanana for all mods. Do you want to continue?
CancelledContent: The update operation was cancelled by the user.
AutoUpdateEnabledDescription: Automatically fetch versions and dates on startup
AutoUpdateIntervalDescription: How often to check for updates (1-365)
FetchAllPreviewsButton_Tooltip: Downloads preview images for all mods
PreviewModeDialogContent: Choose how to handle existing previews:
FetchMissingPreviewsButton_Tooltip: Downloads preview images only for mods without previews
ConfirmFetchMissingPreviews: This will download preview images from GameBanana for mods that don't have previews yet. Do you want to continue?
CreateCategoryFoldersButton_Tooltip: Creates folders for all character categories and downloads their icons
NoGameSelected: No game selected. Please select a game first.
CategoryNotSupported: Character categories are not supported for {0}.
ConfirmCreateCategoryFolders: This will create category folders for all characters in {0} and download their icons. Continue?
FailedToFetchCategories: Failed to fetch character categories or no categories found.
